name: Cron Job Modified
description: Detects modifications to cron jobs on Linux systems - potential persistence
query:
// Cron Job Modification
// Changes to cron directories or crontab
events from endpoint
where file_path contains "/etc/cron" or file_path contains "/var/spool/cron"
  and event_type in ("file_create", "file_modify")
group by hostname, username, file_path
having count(*) >= 1
within 300 seconds
